creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 245124
Patch to allow i386 to build

Revert 0b3f90ab1485d5bd32bd72d41c7fd8213b3b95b9 which breaks FreeBSD/i386 build:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=271201#c8

Plus, it appears to break on Linux for some people:  https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=55408#c6
